data.current_summary: Retrieves summary country information for the provided marketId and filters
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve summary country information by market
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of summary country information filtered by the specified marketId and optional filters. Returns an array of CountrySummary objects containing country identifiers and basic information. No authentication required. Use this endpoint to get a lightweight overview of countries available in a specific market.

data.current_summary: Retrieves country and summary state information for provided countryKey
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve detailed country and state information
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed country information and associated state/region summary data for the specified countryKey. Returns a Country object containing country details and an array of State objects with state identifiers and names. No authentication required. Use this endpoint when you need comprehensive country details including its administrative divisions.
